zh.lifeSummary: 當Yaroslav Svyatopolkovich of Kiev Prince of Volynsk於大約1071年出生在烏克蘭ВолинськаВолодимир-Волинський時，他的父親Svyatoslav Sviatopolk II Izyaslavich, Grand Prince of Kiev22歲，母親Princess Elena Tugorovna of Kuman21歲。他於1091年之前與Hercegnő Árpád-házi Adelhejde在匈牙利艾斯特格姆艾斯特格姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1123年5月在俄羅斯享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yaroslav Svyatopolkovich of Kiev Prince of Volynsk于大约1071年出生在乌克兰ВолинськаВолодимир-Волинський时，他的父亲Svyatoslav Sviatopolk II Izyaslavich, Grand Prince of Kiev22岁，母亲Princess Elena Tugorovna of Kuman21岁。他于1091年之前与Hercegnő Árpád-házi Adelhejde在匈牙利艾斯特格姆艾斯特格姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1123年5月在俄罗斯享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Kiev
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Austrian German: occupational name for a cowherd, Chüyger in the Tyrolean dialect, from Kühe ‘cows’ (plural of Kuh) + -er suffix of agent nouns.
Scottish (Ayrshire and Lanarkshire): variant of   Keir  .

variants.name: Kear
meanings: English (Gloucestershire): occupational name for a locksmith, from Middle English keyer, kayer ‘key-maker, locksmith’ (Old English cǣgere, a derivative of cǣg ‘key’).

nameMeanings.name: Yaroslav
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Yaroslav Svyatopolkovich of Kiev Prince of Volynsk was born about 1071, in Volodymyr-Volynskyi, Volyn, Ukraine, his father, Svyatoslav Sviatopolk II Izyaslavich, Grand Prince of Kiev, was 22 and his mother, Princess Elena Tugorovna of Kuman, was 21. He married Hercegnő Árpád-házi Adelhejde before 1091, in Esztergom, Esztergom, Hungary. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in May 1123, in Russia, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yaroslav Svyatopolkovich of Kiev Prince of Volynsk est né environ 1071, à Volodymyr-Volynsʹkyy, Volyn, Ukraine, son père, Svyatoslav Sviatopolk II Izyaslavich, Grand Prince of Kiev, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Princess Elena Tugorovna of Kuman, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Hercegnő Árpád-házi Adelhejde avant 1091, à Esztergom, Esztergom, Hongrie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en mai 1123, à Russie, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Yaroslav Svyatopolkovich of Kiev Prince of Volynsk um 1071 in Wolodymyr-Wolynskyj, Volyn, Ukraine geboren wurde, war sein Vater Svyatoslav Sviatopolk II Izyaslavich, Grand Prince of Kiev 22 und seine Mutter Princess Elena Tugorovna of Kuman 21. Er hat vor 1091 in Esztergom, Esztergom, Ungarn Hercegnő Árpád-házi Adelhejde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb im Mai 1123 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Russland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yaroslav Svyatopolkovich of Kiev Prince of Volynsk è nato il circa 1071 nel Volodymyr-Volynsʹkyy, Volyn, Ucraina, il suo padre, Svyatoslav Sviatopolk II Izyaslavich, Grand Prince of Kiev, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Princess Elena Tugorovna of Kuman, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Hercegnő Árpád-házi Adelhejde prima del 1091, nel Esztergom, Esztergom, Ungheria. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel maggio 1123, nel Russia, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Yaroslav Svyatopolkovich of Kiev Prince of Volynskが約1071年にウクライナВолинськаВолодимир-Волинськийで生まれた時，父Svyatoslav Sviatopolk II Izyaslavich, Grand Prince of Kievは22歳，母Princess Elena Tugorovna of Kumanは21歳であった。1091年以前にハンガリーエスズテルゴムエスズテルゴムでHercegnő Árpád-házi Adelhejdeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1123年5月にロシアで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Yaroslav Svyatopolkovich of Kiev Prince of Volynsk(이)가 대략 1071년 우크라이나 Волинська Володимир-Волинський에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Svyatoslav Sviatopolk II Izyaslavich, Grand Prince of Kiev(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess Elena Tugorovna of Kuman(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1091년 이전 헝가리 스즈터고 스즈터고에서 Hercegnő Árpád-házi Adelhejde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1123년 5월 러시아에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yaroslav Svyatopolkovich of Kiev Prince of Volynsk nasceu aproximadamente 1071, em Volodymyr-Volynsʹkyy, Volyn, Ucrânia, seu pai, Svyatoslav Sviatopolk II Izyaslavich, Grand Prince of Kiev, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Princess Elena Tugorovna of Kuman, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Hercegnő Árpád-házi Adelhejde antes 1091, em Esztergom, Esztergom, Hungria. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em maio de 1123, em Rússia, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yaroslav Svyatopolkovich of Kiev Prince of Volynsk родился около 1071 г. в местности Владимир-Волынский, Волынская, Украина, его отцу по имени Svyatoslav Sviatopolk II Izyaslavich, Grand Prince of Kiev было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Princess Elena Tugorovna of Kuman, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Hercegnő Árpád-házi Adelhejde перед 1091 г. в местности эсзтиргом, эсзтиргом, Венгрия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер май 1123 г. в местности Россия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Yaroslav Svyatopolkovich of Kiev Prince of Volynsk nació aproximadamente 1071, en Volodymyr-Volynsʹkyy, Volyn, Ucrania, su papá, Svyatoslav Sviatopolk II Izyaslavich, Grand Prince of Kiev, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Princess Elena Tugorovna of Kuman, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Hercegnő Árpád-házi Adelhejde antes de 1091, en Esztergom, Esztergom, Hungría. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en mayo de 1123, en Rusia, a la edad de 53 años.
